# SalesFrame

SalesFrame is a real-time AI sales coach for B2B sellers. It helps sellers prepare for calls, capture live transcript context, follow selected sales methodologies, and ask one better next question while the conversation is still happening.

Most tools record and analyse sales calls after the fact. SalesFrame focuses on live coaching: account context, opportunity context, selected playbooks, previous evidence, and the current conversation flow all shape the next suggested seller question.

## Core pages

- Homepage: https://salesframe.ai/
- Playbooks: https://salesframe.ai/playbooks
- Use cases: https://salesframe.ai/use-cases
- Comparisons: https://salesframe.ai/compare
- Resources: https://salesframe.ai/resources

- Challenger Sale: https://salesframe.ai/playbooks/challenger-sale
- Gap Selling: https://salesframe.ai/playbooks/gap-selling
- SPICED: https://salesframe.ai/playbooks/spiced
